'''Palazidar''' was a [[t'landa Til]] [[Sacredot]] who once fell [[Sleep/Legends|asleep]] while performing the [[Exultation]] on the [[Mountain of the Exalted]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]].
